events.name: Wandering Trader
events.description: A lone trader approaches your camp, offering ammunition in exchange for scrap.

events.name: Wandering Trader
events.description: A trader passes through with surplus food. Interested in scrap.

events.name: Desperate Refugee
events.description: A refugee wants to leave with some food. They look desperate and afraid.

events.name: Heavy Rain
events.description: Dark clouds gather. Heavy rain is expected tonight, reducing visibility.

events.name: Violent Storm
events.description: A violent storm sweeps through the area, damaging all structures.

events.name: Supply Cache Found
events.description: Scouts found a hidden supply cache near the base!

events.name: Abandoned Stash
events.description: An abandoned stash of supplies was discovered in a nearby building.

events.name: Horde Warning
events.description: Scouts report a massive horde approaching. Tonight will be worse than usual.
